name: traction
description: Gino Wickman's Traction: Get a Grip on Your Business — an operating system toolkit (the Entrepreneurial Operating System / EOS) that gives business owners a complete framework (Vision, People, Data, Issues, Process, Traction) for getting their companies unstuck, building a strong leadership team, and creating the discipline to execute.
useCase: Implement a complete business operating system (EOS) — create a shared vision, get the right people in the right seats, use data to drive decisions, solve issues systematically, document processes, and build a meeting rhythm that drives accountability.
knownRisks: EOS is an opinionated system — it may not fit all organizational cultures or leadership styles
The tools require consistent discipline; companies that implement partially often see limited results
The framework is designed for small-to-medium businesses (10-250 people) and may need adaptation for very small or very large organizations
